text:
Perfect! Now the device is showing power consumption (18.4W) with the phone charger connected.

I've added:
1. **Device Control Card** with on/off toggle switch
2. **Real-time status** that updates based on device mode
3. **Toggle functionality** that calls the backend API

The frontend now shows:
- Smart Switch status (ON/OFF)
- Toggle switch to control the device
- Power consumption (18.4W with charger)

Refresh `http://localhost:8000` to see the new Device Control card. The toggle switch should work to turn the smart plug on/off, and the status will update automatically when data refreshes.
